result.stdout:
USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-excel [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    cell <file> <ref>                          Detailed cell info: value,       
                                               formula, type, format (use       
                                               --styling for borders, colors,   
                                               typography)                      
    charts <file>                              List chart objects with type,    
                                               title, and series info           
    distinct <file> <range>                    Unique values with counts from a 
                                               range                            
    docs                                       Output full tool specification in
                                               YAML                             
    extract <file> <sheet> <range> <output>    Extract a range from a sheet and 
                                               save as CSV                      
    formulas <file>                            List all formula cells with      
                                               cached values                    
    histogram <file> <range>                   Value distribution histogram for 
                                               numeric, datetime, or boolean    
                                               ranges                           
    images <file>                              Extract embedded images as base64
    info <file>                                Workbook overview: sheets,       
                                               tables, named ranges, images     
    names <file>                               List named ranges with addresses 
                                               and values                       
    pivots <file>                              List pivot tables with fields and
                                               source ranges                    
    range <file> <range>                       Read cell values from a range as 
                                               a grid                           
    search <file> <query>                      Find cells containing a value    
    sheets <file>                              List sheets with dimensions and  
                                               visibility                       
    stats <file> <range>                       Descriptive statistics (min, max,
                                               sum, mean) for a numeric range   
    table <file> <name>                        Read a structured table by name  
                                               with pagination                  
    tables <file>                              List structured tables with      
                                               columns and types

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-excel [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    cell <file> <ref>                          Detailed cell info: value,       
                                               formula, type, format (use       
                                               --styling for borders, colors,   
                                               typography)                      
    charts <file>                              List chart objects with type,    
                                               title, and series info           
    distinct <file> <range>                    Unique values with counts from a 
                                               range                            
    docs                                       Output full tool specification in
                                               YAML                             
    extract <file> <sheet> <range> <output>    Extract a range from a sheet and 
                                               save as CSV                      
    formulas <file>                            List all formula cells with      
                                               cached values                    
    histogram <file> <range>                   Value distribution histogram for 
                                               numeric, datetime, or boolean    
                                               ranges                           
    images <file>                              Extract embedded images as base64
    info <file>                                Workbook overview: sheets,       
                                               tables, named ranges, images     
    names <file>                               List named ranges with addresses 
                                               and values                       
    pivots <file>                              List pivot tables with fields and
                                               source ranges                    
    range <file> <range>                       Read cell values from a range as 
                                               a grid                           
    search <file> <query>                      Find cells containing a value    
    sheets <file>                              List sheets with dimensions and  
                                               visibility                       
    stats <file> <range>                       Descriptive statistics (min, max,
                                               sum, mean) for a numeric range   
    table <file> <name>                        Read a structured table by name  
                                               with pagination                  
    tables <file>                              List structured tables with      
                                               columns and types

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Detailed cell info: value, formula, type, format (use --styling for borders, 
colors, typography)

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-excel cell <file> <ref> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <file>    Path to the .xlsx file                 
    <ref>     Cell reference (e.g. Sheet1!B15 or B15)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information                                    
        --styling    Include styling info (borders, foreground, background,     
                     typography)

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Unique values with counts from a range

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-excel distinct <file> <range> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <file>     Path to the .xlsx file                      
    <range>    Range reference (e.g. Sheet1!B1:B100 or B:B)

OPTIONS:
                    DEFAULT                            
    -h, --help                 Prints help information 
        --limit                Maximum values to return
        --offset    0          Number of values to skip

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Extract a range from a sheet and save as CSV

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-excel extract <file> <sheet> <range> <output> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <file>      Path to the .xlsx file          
    <sheet>     Sheet name                      
    <range>     Range reference (e.g. A1:D10)   
    <output>    Absolute path to output CSV file

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

ARGUMENTS:
    <file>    Path to the .xlsx file

OPTIONS:
                    DEFAULT                                        
    -h, --help                 Prints help information

        --limit                Maximum number of formulas to return
        --offset    0          Number of formulas to skip

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Value distribution histogram for numeric, datetime, or boolean ranges

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-excel histogram <file> <range> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <file>     Path to the .xlsx file               
    <range>    Range reference (e.g. Sheet1!D2:D100)

OPTIONS:
                    DEFAULT                                         
    -h, --help                 Prints help information              
        --type                 Data type: numeric, datetime, boolean
        --bins      10         Number of bins (default 10)          
        --limit                Maximum bins to return               
        --offset    0          Number of bins to skip

commands.payload:

        --type                 Data type: numeric, datetime, boolean
        --bins      10         Number of bins (default 10)          
        --limit                Maximum bins to return               
        --offset    0          Number of bins to skip

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Find cells containing a value

USAGE:
    ivy-inspector-excel search <file> <query> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <file>     Path to the .xlsx file
    <query>    Value to search for   

OPTIONS:
                     DEFAULT                                                    
    -h, --help                  Prints help information                         
        --sheet                 Filter by sheet name                            
        --limit                 Maximum number of matches to return             
        --offset     0          Number of matches to skip                       
        --styling               Include styling info (borders, foreground,      
                                background, typography)

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:

USAGE:

ARGUMENTS:

    <query>    Value to search for   

OPTIONS:
                     DEFAULT                                                    
    -h, --help                  Prints help information                         
        --sheet                 Filter by sheet name                            
        --limit                 Maximum number of matches to return             
        --offset     0          Number of matches to skip                       
        --styling               Include styling info (borders, foreground,      
                                background, typography)

ARGUMENTS:
    <file>    Path to the .xlsx file
    <name>    Table name

        --limit                Maximum number of rows to return
        --offset    0          Number of rows to skip
